name: The Magical Legend of the Leprechauns
original_name: The Magical Legend of the Leprechauns
overview: In a land of myth and magic, a forbidden love affair ignites an ancient war between the leprechauns and the trooping fairies. Jack Woods is appointed to restore harmony...but will peace prevail before the unthinkable happens?

trailers.title: The Magical Legend Of The Leprechauns Trailer
